examples.title: Manual fill change on operation sign

inputDiff.nodePath: Presets=Text, Skeleton=False / Content / Text / Operation / Minus

examples.expectedInterpretation: The exact reset target is the Minus leaf layer. The recommendation should describe it as a manual color customization of the amount operation sign inside AmountParagraph / Operation.

examples.title: Style variant plus manual leaf fill
examples.expectedInterpretation: Report both the component Style change and the manual Minus fill override. Compare the fill against the current Style baseline.
